## Type of Change

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Data update (colors.json, filaments.json, or palette files)
- [ ] Refactor / code cleanup (no functional change)

## Checklist

- [ ] All tests pass: `python -m unittest discover tests`
- [ ] No Pyright / type errors
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] New features have tests
- [ ] Public API changes have updated docstrings
- [ ] If core data files were modified, hash constants in `constants.py` were regenerated
- [ ] `python -m color_tools --verify-all` passes
